subject: NYTimes: Trump's Economic Cabinet Picks Signal Embrace of Wall St. Elite
body:
Wow. This is truly moronic.

http://www.nytimes.com/2016/11/30/business/dealbook/trumps-economic-cabinet-picks-signal-embrace-of-wall-st-elite.html?smprod=nytcore-ipad&smid=nytcore-ipad-share

Steven Mnuchin, the financier who has been tapped to run Treasury, joins other wealthy investors chosen by Mr. Trump, a sign of possible tax cuts and deregulation ahead.

Sent from my iPad
